roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:DEFENDANT IS ON FORMAL PROBATION & DEFENDANT'S DPO WILL FILEANY RESTITUTION MOTIONS AS NEEDED/

/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/X:SENTENCE ON COUNTS 1 AND 4 ARE THE SAME AND CONCURRENT AS FOLLOWS:/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 34D/CTS:34/IND/X:DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLETE 36 SESSIONS OF ANGER MANAGEMENT,/X:PROTECTED PERSONS JIMMIE D, AND HANA WATERS ARE SWORN AND REQUEST STAY AWAY ORDER BE MODIFIED TO A NO HARASSMENT ORDER, THE REQUEST IS GRANTED,/SATERM/X:THE DEFENDANT MUST NOT HARASSJIMMIE D, AND HANA WATERS AS INDICATED IN THE CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER SIGNED, FILED AND SERVED IN COURT TODAY,/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/RESTV//X:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION TO INCLUDE DISMISSED CHARGES PURSUANT TO HARVEY WAIVER,/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/CONTD:APD RESTITUTION DETERMINATIONIN D30/DOP/X:UPON SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF ANGER MANAGEMENT DEFENDANT MAYREQUEST FORMAL PROBATION BE CONVERTED TO COURT PROBATION,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED,/MISDRED1:1/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1 AND 4/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER,/X:ANY RESTITUTION OR STAY AWAY ORDERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGESMAYBE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COUNTS 1 AND 4,/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/X: BAIL REMAIN SET AT NO BAIL/TE: 3 HRS/X:SUBPEONAED RECORDS ARE RELEASED TO DA MYLES CAMPBELL/X: CASE TO PROCEED INLOVE WAIVER STATUS/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL: MOTION FOR OR RELEASE/OR/DEF:IS ORDERED RELEASED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ONTHE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:08-15-18/987,2/DEF:IS ORDERED RELEASED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONICMONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA1:HANA WATERS & JIMMIE D/SA2:1942 15TH ST, APT, 4, SF CA 94114/SAORD3/OR/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE &PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:FOR I&A, PLEA AND COUNSEL/NP/X:DEFENDANT IS STILL IN THE HOSPITAL/X/THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE CASE/CONTD: FOR I & A, PLEA AND COUNSEL/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/NP/X:DEFT AT SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL/CONTD: FORI & A, PLEA AND CNSL/DOP/
